index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang='en'>
<head>
<meta charset='UTF-8'>
<title>Tower Defense</title>
<style>*{margin:0;padding:0}body{background:#1a1a2e;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;height:100vh;flex-direction:column}canvas{display:block;cursor:pointer}</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id='c' width='600' height='430'></canvas>
<script>
const cv=document.getElementById('c'),ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
const W=600,H=430,CS=30,COLS=20,ROWS=13,GRID_H=390;
const PATH_CELLS=[
  {c:0,r:6},{c:1,r:6},{c:2,r:6},{c:3,r:6},{c:3,r:5},{c:3,r:4},{c:3,r:3},
  {c:4,r:3},{c:5,r:3},{c:6,r:3},{c:7,r:3},{c:7,r:4},{c:7,r:5},{c:7,r:6},
  {c:7,r:7},{c:7,r:8},{c:7,r:9},{c:8,r:9},{c:9,r:9},{c:10,r:9},{c:11,r:9},
  {c:11,r:8},{c:11,r:7},{c:11,r:6},{c:11,r:5},{c:11,r:4},{c:12,r:4},{c:13,r:4},
  {c:14,r:4},{c:14,r:5},{c:14,r:6},{c:14,r:7},{c:14,r:8},{c:14,r:9},{c:14,r:10},
  {c:15,r:10},{c:16,r:10},{c:17,r:10},{c:17,r:9},{c:17,r:8},{c:17,r:7},{c:17,r:6},
  {c:18,r:6},{c:19,r:6}
];
const PATH_SET=new Set(PATH_CELLS.map(p=>p.c+','+p.r));
function isPath(c,r){return PATH_SET.has(c+','+r);}
let gold,lives,wave,waveActive,waveTimer,enemiesLeft,towers,enemies,bullets,score,hoverCell;
function init(){
  gold=200;lives=20;wave=0;waveActive=false;waveTimer=0;enemiesLeft=0;
  towers=[];enemies=[];bullets=[];score=0;hoverCell=null;
}
function spawnWave(){
  wave++;waveActive=true;enemiesLeft=10;
  const hp=60+wave*20;
  for(let i=0;i<10;i++){
    setTimeout(()=>{
      enemies.push({pathIdx:0,progress:0,hp:hp,maxHp:hp,alive:true,slowTimer:0});
    },i*700);
  }
}
function cellCenter(c,r){return{x:c*CS+CS/2,y:r*CS+CS/2};}
function update(){
  if(!waveActive){
    waveTimer++;
    if(waveTimer>300)spawnWave();
    return;
  }
  enemies.forEach(e=>{
    if(!e.alive)return;
    const spd=e.slowTimer>0?0.8:1.5;
    if(e.slowTimer>0)e.slowTimer--;
    e.progress+=spd;
    const segLen=CS;
    const totalLen=(PATH_CELLS.length-1)*segLen;
    if(e.progress>=totalLen){
      e.alive=false;lives--;enemiesLeft--;return;
    }
    const idx=Math.floor(e.progress/segLen);
    const t=(e.progress%segLen)/segLen;
    const p0=PATH_CELLS[Math.min(idx,PATH_CELLS.length-1)];
    const p1=PATH_CELLS[Math.min(idx+1,PATH_CELLS.length-1)];
    e.x=cellCenter(p0.c,p0.r).x+(cellCenter(p1.c,p1.r).x-cellCenter(p0.c,p0.r).x)*t;
    e.y=cellCenter(p0.c,p0.r).y+(cellCenter(p1.c,p1.r).y-cellCenter(p0.c,p0.r).y)*t;
  });
  towers.forEach(t=>{
    t.cooldown--;
    if(t.cooldown>0)return;
    const range=t.type==='cannon'?120:80;
    const interval=t.type==='cannon'?90:60;
    const tc=cellCenter(t.c,t.r);
    let target=null,minDist=Infinity;
    enemies.forEach(e=>{
      if(!e.alive)return;
      const d=Math.hypot(e.x-tc.x,e.y-tc.y);
      if(d<range&&e.progress>minDist-0.001){}
      if(d<range&&d<minDist+1){minDist=d;target=e;}
    });
    let farthest=null,farthestProg=-1;
    enemies.forEach(e=>{
      if(!e.alive)return;
      const d=Math.hypot(e.x-tc.x,e.y-tc.y);
      if(d<range&&e.progress>farthestProg){farthestProg=e.progress;farthest=e;}
    });
    if(farthest){
      t.cooldown=interval;
      bullets.push({x:tc.x,y:tc.y,tx:farthest,type:t.type,speed:6});
    }
  });
  bullets=bullets.filter(b=>{
    const dx=b.tx.x-b.x,dy=b.tx.y-b.y,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy);
    if(d<b.speed+4){
      if(b.type==='cannon'){
        enemies.forEach(e=>{
          if(!e.alive)return;
          if(Math.hypot(e.x-b.tx.x,e.y-b.tx.y)<35){e.hp-=30;if(e.hp<=0){e.alive=false;gold+=10;score+=50;enemiesLeft--;}}
        });
      }else{
        if(b.tx.alive){b.tx.hp-=15;if(b.tx.hp<=0){b.tx.alive=false;gold+=10;score+=50;enemiesLeft--;}}
      }
      return false;
    }
    b.x+=dx/d*b.speed;b.y+=dy/d*b.speed;
    return true;
  });
  if(waveActive&&enemiesLeft<=0&&enemies.every(e=>!e.alive)){waveActive=false;waveTimer=0;enemies=[];}
}
function draw(){
  ctx.fillStyle='#1a1a0a';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,GRID_H);
  for(let r=0;r<ROWS;r++)for(let c=0;c<COLS;c++){
    const x=c*CS,y=r*CS;
    if(isPath(c,r)){
      ctx.fillStyle='#8b6914';ctx.fillRect(x,y,CS,CS);
      ctx.fillStyle='#7a5c10';ctx.fillRect(x+2,y+2,CS-4,CS-4);
    }else{
      ctx.fillStyle='#2d4a1e';ctx.fillRect(x,y,CS,CS);
      ctx.fillStyle='#263f18';ctx.fillRect(x+1,y+1,CS-2,CS-2);
    }
  }
  if(hoverCell&&!isPath(hoverCell.c,hoverCell.r)&&!towers.find(t=>t.c===hoverCell.c&&t.r===hoverCell.r)){
    const hx=hoverCell.c*CS,hy=hoverCell.r*CS;
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,100,0.15)';ctx.fillRect(hx,hy,CS,CS);
  }
  towers.forEach(t=>{
    const x=t.c*CS,y=t.r*CS;
    if(t.type==='basic'){
      ctx.fillStyle='#5599ff';ctx.fillRect(x+4,y+4,CS-8,CS-8);
      ctx.fillStyle='#88bbff';ctx.fillRect(x+8,y+4,CS-16,6);
    }else{
      ctx.fillStyle='#cc4400';ctx.fillRect(x+3,y+3,CS-6,CS-6);
      ctx.fillStyle='#ff6622';ctx.fillRect(x+6,y+3,CS-12,5);
    }
  });
  if(hoverCell){
    const ht=towers.find(t=>t.c===hoverCell.c&&t.r===hoverCell.r);
    if(ht){
      const range=ht.type==='cannon'?120:80;
      const cc=cellCenter(ht.c,ht.r);
      ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.25)';ctx.lineWidth=1;
      ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(cc.x,cc.y,range,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.stroke();
    }
  }
  enemies.forEach(e=>{
    if(!e.alive)return;
    ctx.fillStyle=e.slowTimer>0?'#88aaff':'#88ee33';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(e.x,e.y,8,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
    ctx.fillStyle='#004400';ctx.fillRect(e.x-10,e.y-16,20,4);
    ctx.fillStyle='#00cc00';ctx.fillRect(e.x-10,e.y-16,20*(e.hp/e.maxHp),4);
  });
  bullets.forEach(b=>{
    ctx.fillStyle=b.type==='cannon'?'#ff6600':'#ffff00';
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(b.x,b.y,b.type==='cannon'?5:3,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();
  });
  ctx.fillStyle='#111';ctx.fillRect(0,GRID_H,W,H-GRID_H);
  ctx.fillStyle='#ffd700';ctx.font='bold 14px monospace';ctx.textAlign='left';
  ctx.fillText('Gold: '+gold,10,GRID_H+18);
  ctx.fillStyle='#ff6666';ctx.fillText('Lives: '+lives,10,GRID_H+35);
  ctx.fillStyle='#88aaff';ctx.textAlign='center';
  ctx.fillText('Wave: '+wave,W/2,GRID_H+18);
  ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,W/2,GRID_H+35);
  ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='10px monospace';ctx.textAlign='right';
  ctx.fillText('L-click:Basic $50  R-click:Cannon $100',590,GRID_H+18);
  if(!waveActive){
    const remaining=Math.ceil((300-waveTimer)/60);
    ctx.fillStyle='#ffff88';ctx.font='11px monospace';
    ctx.fillText('Next wave in: '+remaining+'s',590,GRID_H+35);
  }
  if(lives<=0){
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.8)';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,GRID_H);
    ctx.fillStyle='#f44';ctx.font='bold 48px monospace';ctx.textAlign='center';
    ctx.fillText('GAME OVER',W/2,180);
    ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='22px monospace';ctx.fillText('Score: '+score,W/2,240);
    ctx.fillStyle='#aaa';ctx.font='15px monospace';ctx.fillText('Reload to play again',W/2,290);
  }
}
cv.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{
  const rect=cv.getBoundingClientRect();
  const mx=e.clientX-rect.left,my=e.clientY-rect.top;
  if(my<GRID_H)hoverCell={c:Math.floor(mx/CS),r:Math.floor(my/CS)};
  else hoverCell=null;
});
cv.addEventListener('click',e=>{
  if(!hoverCell||isPath(hoverCell.c,hoverCell.r))return;
  if(towers.find(t=>t.c===hoverCell.c&&t.r===hoverCell.r))return;
  if(gold>=50){towers.push({c:hoverCell.c,r:hoverCell.r,type:'basic',cooldown:0});gold-=50;}
});
cv.addEventListener('contextmenu',e=>{
  e.preventDefault();
  if(!hoverCell||isPath(hoverCell.c,hoverCell.r))return;
  if(towers.find(t=>t.c===hoverCell.c&&t.r===hoverCell.r))return;
  if(gold>=100){towers.push({c:hoverCell.c,r:hoverCell.r,type:'cannon',cooldown:0});gold-=100;}
});
function loop(){
  if(lives>0){update();}
  draw();
  requestAnimationFrame(loop);
}
init();spawnWave();loop();
</script>
</body>
</html>
